notes: Manufacturer-confirmed price €33.99 and weight 1.28 kg. Dimensions 24.5 x 24.5 x 33 cm (Prestwich Hydroponics). Mist output range 250-350 ml/h confirmed by multiple retailers; power 30W from Prestwich Hydroponics. Noise <35 dB per Prestwich; 35 dB used as max. One retailer (La Huerta) notes unit is 'not suited for connecting to a hygrostat', suggesting possible absence of auto-restart on power interruption; controller compatibility not confirmed by manufacturer. Use distilled/RO water only. Runtime 32h calculated at 250 ml/h min output.
